use_cases: Simulating live chat feeds on landing pages or demos
Displaying real-time messaging previews in streaming platform UIs
Showing community chat activity in creator tool dashboards
Demonstrating chat functionality in SaaS documentation
Previewing chat overlays for live streaming applications
ai_summary: A customizable chat preview component that simulates real-time message streams with animated visibility control via IntersectionObserver. Supports multiple variations (default, compact, expanded), custom theming, gradient backgrounds, and timed message sequencing. Ideal for displaying simulated chat feeds in demos, landing pages, or streaming platform interfaces with a modern, minimal aesthetic.
